news.t: Medincell and AIC Unveil New Positive Phase 3 Results for mdc-CWM: Major Subgroup Analysis Shows Reduced Pain and Opioid Use, and Accelerated Rehabilitation following Total Knee Replacement
ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds

holdings.infoBox: ROM is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Technology (ROM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Technology Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index that measures the performance of large US technology companies. ROM was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Medincell and AIC Unveil New Positive Phase 3 Results for mdc-CWM: Major Subgroup Analysis Shows Reduced Pain and Opioid Use, and Accelerated Rehabilitation following Total Knee Replacement
data.text: MONTPELLIER, France--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Analysis of a major subgroup of patients undergoing a first Total Knee Replacement (TKR), representing over 70% of the trial population (108 out of 151), revealed...
